title: How do I find the boards/templates that Jasmine Hendricks used in her demo during Elevate22
excerpt: Hi there!  I really learned a lot and now I need to dig in to all the things that I learned about on a high level.  Is there a template available similar to what Jasmine used during her demo today?

posts.author: JHarrison (JHarrison)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I really learned a lot and now I need to dig in to all the things that I learned about on a high level. Is there a template available similar to what Jasmine used during her demo today?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JHarrison!

We are so glad to hear you found the Elevate 22 sessions valuable! As for the templates Jasmine explored, you should find them available when searching the titles in the templates store:

  • Project Portfolio Management
  • Project Requests & Approvals

Let me know if this helps!
